REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, PETITIONERS DEAN TULLY, KENT JOHNSON'S PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD. NO APPEARANCES. THE COURT ADOPTS ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: GRANTED. NO OPPOSITION FILED. ATTORNEY'S FEES GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $3,857.50. COSTS GRANTED IN THE AMOUNT OF $471.59. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED FORM OF ORDER. JUDGE: HARRY L. JACOBS, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED
ORDER GRANTING PETITION TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD
ORDER GRANTING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO RESPONDENT DUNNE, SHANE

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, RESPONDENT SHANE DUNNE'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT PER CCP 473(A)(1) AND 473.5 IS CONTINUED TO APRIL 30, 2026 ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION. JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES, CLERK: E. LARNAUTI, NOT REPORTED

REAL PROPERTY/HOUSING MOTION 501, NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION TO SET ASIDE JUDGMENT PER CCP SECTION 473(A)(1) AND 473.5 IS DENIED. THE TITLE OF THE MOTION REFERENCES CCP 473(A)(1) AND CCP 473.5. NOTICE OF MOTION ONLY REFERENCED CCP 473(A)(1) AND THE POINTS AND AUTHORITIES CITE NO CASES APPLYING THIS CODE SECTION TO THE CIRCUMSTANCES SIMILAR TO THE CASE AT BAR. CCP 473.5 IS DISCUSSED IN THE POINTS AND AUTHORITIES, BUT IS NOT REFERENCED IN THE NOTICE OF MOTION. IN OPPOSITION PETITIONER POINTS OUT THAT NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT WAS SERVED IN THIS CASE ON JULY 31, 2025, MORE THAN 180 DAYS BEFORE THIS MOTION WAS FILED. PREVAILING PARTY TO SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER THAT IN COMPLIANCE WITH CRC 3.1312(B) JUDGE: CHARLES F. HAINES; CLERK: L. YOUNG ; NOT REPORTED. (D501)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Judgment Per Ccp Section 473(A)(1) And 473.5
Off Calendar Apr-30-2026 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:

Jerod Hendrickson; 415-296-0900; Sheppard, Uziel & Hendrickson Law Firm; counsel appearing for petitioner via Zoom.
Shane Dunne; 415-218-7748; respondent appearing in pro per.

Mr. Dunne contests the courts tentative ruling. Hearing held. Argued. After reviewing the pleadings and listening to oral arguments the Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

RESPONDENT SHANE DUNNE Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Judgment Per Ccp Section 473(A)(1) And 473.5 is DENIED. The title of the motion references CCP 473(a)(1) and CCP 473.5. Notice of Motion only referenced CCP 473(a)(1) and the Points and Authorities cite no cases applying this code section to the circumstances similar to the case at bar. CCP 473.5 is discussed in the Points and Authorities, but is not referenced in the Notice of Motion. In opposition Petitioner points out that Notice of Entry of Judgment was served in this case on July 31, 2025, more than 180 days before this motion was filed.

Prevailing party to submit a proposed order that in compliance with CRC 3.1312(b)
Judge: Charles F. Haines; Clerk: L. Young ; Not Reported. (D501)

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Judgment Per Ccp Section 473(A)(1) And 473.5

No appearances. The court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: continued to April 30, 2026 on the Court's own motion. Judge: Charles F. Haines, Clerk: E. Larnauti, Not Reported (501/CFH)
